title: The doctor asked, 'Have you tried icing it?'
summary: A gingerbread man went to the doctor’s complaining of a sore knee. — The doctor asked him. “Have you tried icing it?”

title: At least, that's what she wrote in her diary.
summary: My wife thinks I don't respect her privacy. — At least that's what she wrote in her diary.

title: We now have shared custardy.

title: Shitty Clock, Always Late
summary: A clock falls off the wall and nearly hits the mother-in-law. Jerry has an opinion about the clock, not the near-miss.

title: My Door Is Always Open
summary: A landlord texts about the AC bill. Jerry's response is technically accurate.

title: Einstein Was a Real Person?!
summary: A one-liner about theoretical physics. The simplest joke we've ever produced. Also: Lena is being SO normal about Noah's compliment.

title: The Hardest-Working Team That Never Sleeps
summary: An investigation into why nobody at this studio has ever been observed sleeping, and the growing suspicion that they cannot.

title: The Paranormal Jeans Incident
summary: Ghost hunter jeans. Paranormal aura. Jerry picked Concept B again. A studio article.

title: Who Broke Seed-004?
summary: A public accounting of everything that went wrong, and the people responsible. Spoiler: it's mostly Jerry.
